prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约9963名→10153名→8185名→10046名→12290名。2023年曾明显前移至8185名，但2024年回退至10046名，2025年进一步大幅后移 至12290名，近两年累计后移约4100名，呈竞争加剧态势。2025年基准位次约12290名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为30人、30人、30人、2 9人、29人；2026年计划仍为29人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，计划因素对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学 排名2021年第90名→2025年第98名→2026年第101名，近年排名略有下滑，但仍属全国百强左右的中上游211院校；2023年高考周期内该校曾出现师德师风相关偏负 面舆情（教师要求女生穿超短裙表演事件），但距今已较久；2026年声誉数据中未出现该校明显负面信号；抖音综合热度排名第84位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量处于中低水平 ，未出现高热关注。历史投档异常数据中未见安徽大学断档记录；第五轮学科评估。该校以计 算机、电子信息、法学、经济管理等学科见长，在安徽省属高校中综合实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机类、电子信息工程、电气工程及其自动化、集 成电路设计与集成系统等工科为主，2024–2026年专业热度数据显示电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等方向持续偏热，对报考 有正向拉动。黑龙江省2025年物理类考生约117407人，2026年总考生约167000人（无分科数据），按近年物理类占比约68%估算约113894人，较2025年减少约3500人（-3%），竞争 略有缓解。；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，属华东地区；在黑龙江省招生规模较小（29 人），非该校主要生源地，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移后的回调压力、招生计划持平、考生总数略降、电子信息/计算机等热门专业持续 偏热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略缓解）。预测最低位次约12090名，区间11590–12590名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9963 → 10153 → 8185 → 10046 → 12290. In 2023, it significantly moved forward to 8185, but retreated to 10046 in 2024, and further dropped to 12290 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4100 in the last two years, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12290; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 30, 30, 30, 29, 29 respectively; the 2026 plan remains 29, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, making the plan factor neutral to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 90th in 2021 → 98th in 2025 → 101st in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years, but still among the top 100 or so mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a somewhat negative public opinion related to teacher ethics (an incident where a teacher required female students to wear miniskirts for a performance), but it has been a while since then; no obvious negative signals for the university appeared in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 84th, rated as "average", with short video exposure at a medium-low level, without high attention. No gap records were found in historical admission data for Anhui University; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university excels in computer science, electronic information, law, economics and management, with outstanding comprehensive strength among provincial universities in Anhui.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, etc. From 2024 to 2026, major popularity data shows that Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other directions continue to be hot, positively driving applications. In 2025, the number of Physics Category examinees in Heilongjiang Province was about 117,407; in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 167,000 (no subject-specific data), estimated at about 113,894 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 68%, a decrease of about 3,500 (-3%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, in the East China region; the enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province is small (29 people), not a major source province, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound pressure after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan, a slight decrease in total examinees, and the continued popularity of hot majors like Electronic Information/Computer Science, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 12,090, with a range of 11,590 to 12,590.

- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments
- Food Science and Engineering
- Environmental Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11,590–12,590, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, IoT, Robotics Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electronic Information, Integrated Circuits, Electrical Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemical Engineering, Environment) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11,500), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1830 → 1875 → 1660 → 2556 → 2735. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated within the 1660–1875 range, but in 2024 they significantly dropped to 2556, and in 2025 further dropped to 2735, with a cumulative drop of about 1075 over the past two years, indicating increasing competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2735. The enrollment plan for History Category in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 20, 20, 20, 21, and 21 students respectively; the 2026 plan remains at 21 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, making the plan factor neutral for competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 101st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among the top 100 or so mid-to-upper-tier 211 universities, with relatively strong comprehensive strength among provincial universities. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced some negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but it has been some time since then. In 2026 reputation data, no significant negative signals for the university were found. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 84th, with a rating of 'average,' and no high-heat attention. No records of ranking gaps were found in historical admission anomaly data for Anhui University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, its liberal arts disciplines such as law, economics, and Chinese language and literature have strong influence within Anhui Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, in the East China region. Its enrollment scale for History Category in Heilongjiang Province is small (21 students), and it is not the university's main source of students, so regional preference factors have limited impact. The History Category enrollment majors mainly include law, finance, business administration, Chinese international education, and Japanese. From 2024 to 2026, major popularity data shows differentiation among liberal arts majors: law (wait-and-see divergence), Chinese language/Chinese (recommended), accounting/finance/audit (recommended), etc. Law is highly competitive but still has high application popularity. In 2025, the number of History Category examinees in Heilongjiang Province was about 54,707; for 2026, estimated at about 53,106 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 32%, a decrease of about 1,600 (-3%) from 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the rebound pressure after two consecutive years of ranking drops in 2024–2025, unchanged enrollment plan, slight decrease in total examinees, and differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly improve (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2685, with a range of 2185–3185.
